description: A designed social-media card built over a real photograph of a hillside residential neighborhood of single-family houses (Victorian and craftsman-style homes in muted greens, yellows, grays and reds) overlooking a body of water, with a strip of bright green grass in the foreground. At the top center is the official White House wordmark: a small engraving of the White House building above the text 'The WHITE HOUSE' in a serif font. Across the lower third is a white rounded rectangle styled like a news clipping containing a black highlight box with 'Bloomberg' in white, and below it a bold black headline: 'US Housing Starts Surge to Highest Level Since December 2024,' with the phrase 'Highest Level Since December 2024' emphasized in a yellow marker-style highlight. The composition mimics a screenshotted news headline overlaid on aspirational suburban imagery. The propaganda technique is appropriation of a third-party news outlet's credibility (Bloomberg) to attribute positive economic results to the administration; the tweet text adds 'WE'RE BUILDING AGAIN' with a US flag emoji. Target audience: general public / supporters being shown evidence of economic revival under Trump.
notable_text: The WHITE HOUSE | Bloomberg | US Housing Starts Surge to Highest Level Since December 2024
